block_info.label: Outer Tensor Stream
block_info.description: Stream-based outer tensor block for AI Engines.

parameters.name: TP_API
parameters.description: The form of IO: 0 for windows, 1 for streams
parameters.label: API:

parameters.name: data_type_A
parameters.description: describes the type of individual data samples input to the function.
parameters.label: A input data type:

parameters.name: data_type_B
parameters.description: describes the type of individual data samples input to the function.
parameters.label: B input data type:

parameters.name: dim_a
parameters.description: describes the number of samples in the vector A.
parameters.label: A input length:

parameters.name: dim_b
parameters.description: describes the number of samples in the vector B.
parameters.label: B input length:

parameters.name: num_frames
parameters.description: describes the number of outer tensor product operations to perform per call to the kernel.
parameters.label: Number of frames:

parameters.name: shift_output
parameters.description: describes the number of bits to downshift.
parameters.label: Scale output down by 2^:

parameters.name: ssr
parameters.description: describes the number of kernels to use in parallel to perform the windowing function.
parameters.label: SSR:

parameters.name: rnd_mode
parameters.description: describes the selection of rounding to be applied during the shift down stage of processing.
parameters.label: Rounding mode:

parameters.name: sat_mode
parameters.description: describes the selection of saturation to be applied during the shift down stage of processing.
parameters.label: Saturation mode:
